locator.quote: the gradient reaching that output is weak: it only flows

text: In v1 the per-runner arb_spread action exists but the gradient reaching that output is weak: it only flows through the long credit chain passive fills → locked_pnl → reward.

locator.quote: Adding a fill-probability auxiliary head gives this

text: Adding a fill-probability auxiliary head gives this output a direct, supervised training signal on every fill or non-fill, sharpening arb-spread choices much faster than the distal reward.
